title: Light Korean Cottage Cheese Stir-fry
description: A light and healthy meal-prep option featuring cottage cheese in a quick stir-fry with minimal oil and spices for a halal-friendly dish.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons low-sodium soy sauce (or tamari for a gluten-free option)
1/4 cup mixed frozen vegetables (e.g., carrots, peas)

instructions: In a large bowl, combine cottage cheese with lemon juice and minced garlic.
Add soy sauce, black pepper, and salt to taste. Stir well.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Pour the mixture into the heated pan and stir-fry for about 3-4 minutes, or until vegetables are tender-crisp and cheese is warm but not fully melted.
Garnish with fresh herbs like mint or cilantro if desired.
